mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT T1.INSR_PROD_CD AS insrProdCd, T1.CMPN_LMT_AMT AS cmpnLmtAmt, T1.INSR_ENGG_CNT AS insrEnggCnt, T1.INSR_TYPE_CD AS insrTypeCd, T1.RPRS_PRDT_ID AS rprsPrdtId, T2.DTL_CD_NM AS insrProdNm FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_MST@DL_MSP T1 LEFT JOIN MSF_CD_DTL T2 ON T1.INSR_PROD_CD = T2.DTL_CD AND T2.CD_GROUP_ID = 'IntmInsrRelNm' WHERE T1.USG_YN = 'Y'
AND T1.INSR_ENGG_CNT = 0
AND T1.INSR_ENGG_CNT > 0
ORDER BY T1.CMPN_LMT_AMT DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MSF_CUST_REQUEST_INSR ( REQUEST_KEY, CRET_DT, CRET_ID, INSR_CD, INSR_PROD_CD, CLAUSE_INSURANCE_YN, CLAUSE_INSR_PROD_YN, INSR_AUTH_INFO ) VALUES ( #{requestKey}, NOW(), #{custId}, #{insrCd}, #{insrProdCd}, #{clauseInsuranceYn}, #{clauseInsrProdYn}, #{insrAuthInfo} )
